title: Phoenix thrash NMU
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS -  Formosa Phoenix Rugby Club from Plettenberg Bay thrashed Nelson Mandela Bay (NMU) 33 - 0 this past Saturday on their home turf, the New Horizon sports ground.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - Formosa Phoenix Rugby Club from Plettenberg Bay thrashed Nelson Mandela Bay (NMU) 33 - 0 this past Saturday on their home turf, the New Horizon sports ground."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Phoenix's next game will be against Greater Knysna this Saturday, 17 August, at the Safe Hub Sport Facility in White Location, Knysna."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
